heading: What to prioritize at each age

values: Shallow, calm lagoon; crib availability; short transfer
Long seaplane transfers with a baby; strong currents near the villa
Kids' club minimum age; pool with shallow end; family villa layout
Clubs that only start at age 4+ or 5+
Kids' club activities; snorkeling lessons; teen-free pool times if needed
All-inclusive drink packages that don't suit children's schedules
Watersports, teen club or lounge, WiFi quality
Resorts that are adults-only or honeymoon-focused
